definitions.text: In a direct manner; in a straight line or course.
examples: He drove directly to the office, and didn't stop off at the petrol station.

definitions.text: In a straightforward way; without anything intervening; not by secondary but by direct means.
examples: I'm sick of asking you to fire him; I'll just do it directly.

definitions.text: Plainly, without circumlocution or ambiguity; absolutely; in express terms.
examples: I'm going to tell Natalie directly that I love her.
To put it more directly: he's not 'made redundant' but sacked.

definitions.text: As soon as; immediately (elliptical for directly that/as/when)
